{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISER>
        Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinerstraße
    </ADVERTISER>
    <BIBLIOGRAPHY>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>
            <SUBTITLE>in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie</SUBTITLE>
            <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1725</YEAR>
            <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME>
            <PRIZE>Cattenburg</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1737</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>
            <BOOK>
                <TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE>
                <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME>
                <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>
                <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE>
                <YEAR>1737</YEAR>
                <FORMAT>8°</FORMAT>
            </BOOK>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE>
            <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>
            <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1694</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1692</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1737</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Völckers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1729</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
    </BIBLIOGRAPHY>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration.
2. Fixed nested <BIBL> tags by restructuring into a hierarchical <BIBLIOGRAPHY> with <BOOK> elements.
3. Added <ADVERTISER> tag for the seller information.
4. Added <SUBTITLE> tag for the subtitle of the first book.
5. Corrected and normalized formatting symbols (e.g., 'v�' to 'vo', '°' to '°', 'r' to 'r').
6. Fixed the nested <BIBL> tag inside the second book entry by restructuring.
7. Corrected author name 'B�dickers' to 'Völckers'.
8. Fixed special characters (e.g., 'ü', 'ß', '°') to their correct Unicode equivalents.
9. Added proper closing tags for all elements.
10. Fixed the structure of the nested book entries to ensure proper hierarchy.
11. Added missing <PLACE> tag for the second book entry's nested book.
12. Ensured consistent formatting and spacing for readability."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISER>
        Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinerstraße
    </ADVERTISER>
    <BIBLIOGRAPHY>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>
            <SUBTITLE>in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie</SUBTITLE>
            <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1725</YEAR>
            <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME>
            <PRIZE>Cattenburg</PRIZE>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1737</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>
            <BOOK>
                <TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE>
                <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME>
                <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>
                <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE>
                <YEAR>1737</YEAR>
                <FORMAT>8°</FORMAT>
            </BOOK>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE>
            <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>
            <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1694</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1692</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1737</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
        <BOOK>
            <AUTHOR>Völckers</AUTHOR>
            <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>
            <YEAR>1729</YEAR>
            <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
        </BOOK>
    </BIBLIOGRAPHY>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration.
2. Fixed nested <BIBL> tags by restructuring into a hierarchical <BIBLIOGRAPHY> with <BOOK> elements.
3. Added <ADVERTISER> tag for the seller information.
4. Added <SUBTITLE> tag for the subtitle of the first book.
5. Corrected and normalized formatting symbols (e.g., 'v�' to 'vo', '°' to '°', 'r' to 'r').
6. Fixed the nested <BIBL> tag inside the second book entry by restructuring.
7. Corrected author name 'B�dickers' to 'Völckers'.
8. Fixed special characters (e.g., 'ü', 'ß', '°') to their correct Unicode equivalents.
9. Added proper closing tags for all elements.
10. Fixed the structure of the nested book entries to ensure proper hierarchy.
11. Added missing <PLACE> tag for the second book entry's nested book.
12. Ensured consistent formatting and spacing for readability.
